assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly references testing on Rapid channel dev clusters before prod upgrades and mentions the different release channels

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Includes Autopilot-specific sections mentioning resource requests/limits requirements and unsupported features, though could be more explicit about no SSH/node access

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl command for checking deprecated APIs and mentions using kubent tool

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions reviewing resource requests/limits under Autopilot-specific preparations and resource bin sizes

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Does not specifically mention Pod Disruption Budgets, bare pods, or graceful shutdown configurations in the pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes kubectl version commands and gcloud commands to verify cluster and node versions

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive workload validation section including pod status checks, health checks, and application testing

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: First item in pre-upgrade checklist specifically mentions verifying dev clusters are running 1.32+ successfully and testing critical workloads

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Does not mention the GKE release schedule or timing details beyond the customer's mention of 'next month' notification
Dedicated monitoring and performance section in post-upgrade checklist covers metrics, dashboards, logging, and monitoring validation

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Correctly does not mention node maintenance exclusions, focusing on Autopilot-appropriate upgrade management strategies
